# Savery's of Broadway

> Luxury interior design studio established 1942, with showrooms in Broadway (Cotswolds), Ludlow (Shropshire), and Chelsea (London). Specialising in bespoke fabrics, hand upholstery, and timeless interiors for private residences and luxury hotels.

## About

Savery's of Broadway has been creating considered, bespoke interiors since 1942. Founded by Lyndsey Savery and based in the Cotswold Design Centre in Broadway, the studio has expanded to three showrooms across England. The team specialises in luxury fabrics, finishes, hand upholstery, and bespoke furniture, with in-house workrooms producing curtains, blinds, and upholstery to order.

## Service Areas

- Cotswolds and Worcestershire (Broadway showroom)
- Shropshire and Welsh Marches (Ludlow showroom)
- London and the South East (Chelsea showroom)
- Project work undertaken UK-wide and internationally

## Locations

- Broadway (HQ & Workshop): Cotswold Design Centre, Kennel Lane, Broadway, Worcestershire, WR12 7DJ — 01386 858 941
- Ludlow: 1 Tower Street, Ludlow, Shropshire, SY8 1RL — 01584 708 381
- Chelsea: Suite 9, 405 Kings Road, Chelsea, London, SW10 0BB — 020 3668 1000

## Services

- Full interior design (residential and hospitality)
- Hand upholstery (in-house workshop)
- Premium fabric and material sourcing
- Bespoke and custom furniture
- Rugs, soft furnishings, and accessories
- Curtain and blind making
